allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/coco壱番屋/data/products.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); prods=d['products']; print\(f'総商品数: {len\(prods\)}件'\); has_std=[p for p in prods if p['standards']['default'] is not None]; print\(f'定数あり: {len\(has_std\)}件'\); from collections import Counter; locs=Counter\(p['location'] for p in prods\); print\('\\\\n保管場所:'\); [print\(f'  {l}: {c}件'\) for l,c in sorted\(locs.items\(\)\)]")
